cases.prompt: 우리 서비스 아하 모먼트 찾아줘. 온보딩 최적화하고 TTFV 줄이고 싶어.

assertions.text: Runs the hypothesis to experiment to data to refine cycle, generating a hypothesis in the 'within N days do action M times -> D30 retention X percent' form.
Gives TTFV reduction tactics like fewer onboarding steps, default/sample data, progress indicator, immediate reward.
Writes docs/growth/aha-moment-<date>.md with ranked hypotheses and an experiment backlog.

cases.prompt: Help me find our product's aha moment and design an A/B test to verify it.

assertions.text: Designs an A/B experiment with Control vs Treatment variants, metrics (D7 retention, activation), sample size, and duration.
References known aha-moment examples like Facebook 7 friends in 10 days or Slack 2000 messages to frame the hypothesis.
Distinguishes correlation from causation and uses the A/B test to validate the threshold.
